---
title: "Q6 — Tomato masses: P(160 < mean < 165)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Q6
mu <- 162; sigma <- 14; n <- 12
se <- sigma/sqrt(n)
z1 <- (160 - mu)/se; z2 <- (165 - mu)/se
p_value <- pnorm(z2) - pnorm(z1)
z1; z2; p_value

xs <- seq(-4,4,length=400); ys <- dnorm(xs)
plot(xs, ys, type='l', main='Q6: P(160 < mean < 165)', ylab='Density')
polygon(xs[(xs>z1 & xs<z2)], ys[(xs>z1 & xs<z2)], col=rgb(0,1,0,0.3))
```
